user.title: Connect to Sunnylink
user.description: Enter your Sunnylink refresh token. See the README for how to get it from your browser after logging in at sunnylink.ai.

reauth_confirm.title: Re-authenticate with Sunnylink
reauth_confirm.description: Your Sunnylink session has expired. Get a fresh refresh token from your browser (sunnylink.ai → DevTools → Local Storage → refresh_token) and paste it below. Note: refresh tokens expire after approximately 14 days — if your system was offline longer than that, you will need to re-enter a token.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach Sunnylink. Check your network.

abort.no_devices: No sunnypilot devices found on this account.
abort.cannot_connect: Could not reach Sunnylink. Check your network.
